Hero.title: Hi, I'm Ania
Hero.subtitle: I build web applications and grow towards software engineering and AI.

About.title: About Me
About.p1: I am a self-taught developer focused on software engineering since 2021. My approach centers on deeply understanding the core fundamentals of web development — from frontend UI and backend architecture to deployment workflows.
About.p2: I value minimalism, clean code, and thoughtful user experiences (UX). My goal is to build practical web applications that seamlessly combine robust functionality with elegant design.
About.p3: I constantly expand my skillset through hands-on problem solving and experimentation. In my daily workflow, I effectively leverage AI tools to accelerate prototyping and optimize development processes.
About.hobby_2: Creative Crafts: interested in drawing, macramé, and crochet
About.hobby_3: Problem Solving: built a strong analytical foundation through C++ and algorithms

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.savewave_desc: A personal finance web application built mainly to better understand backend architecture, MVC patterns, and building larger applications from scratch.
Projects.savewave_h1: Custom lightweight MVC framework built in PHP
Projects.savewave_h3: Receipt scanning using local Tesseract OCR
Projects.keeper-app_desc: A note-taking application created while learning React, backend fundamentals, and deployment workflows.
Projects.keeper-app_h2: AI note suggestions powered by Gemini API
Projects.keeper-app_h3: Deployment using Docker, PM2, and Nginx
Projects.anavers_desc: My portfolio website built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, with multilingual support.
